glue.crawler.deltatarget.CfnAbout: Specifies a Delta data store to crawl one or more Delta tables.

glue.crawler.deltatarget.ConnectionName.Description: The name of the connection to use to connect to the Delta table target.

glue.crawler.deltatarget.CreateNativeDel.Description: Specifies whether the crawler will create native tables, to allow integration with query engines that support querying of the Delta transaction log directly.

glue.crawler.deltatarget.DeltaTables.Description: A list of the Amazon S3 paths to the Delta tables.

glue.crawler.deltatarget.WriteManifest.Description: Specifies whether to write the manifest files to the Delta table path.
